text: 2026-07-09: runtime-loader refactor landed (see commit 'amatrix.opencl: resolve OpenCL/CLBlast at runtime'). Build path complete: no link-time deps, Makevars.win, OS_type removed, amatrix_install_clblast(). REMAINING for close: (1) R-universe dashboard green for amatrix.opencl on Windows builders, (2) one manual certification run on physical Windows GPU hardware, recorded in backend-certification.md.
